request.prompt:
You are a precise data extraction algorithm. Analyze the following content regarding a possible strike from "Trenord" (the public transport company of Lombardia (03)). IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS: 1. Decide if this document is actually announcing a new/upcoming strike. - If it is a cancellation/revocation of a strike, set isStrike to false. - If it is just providing information about participation (adesione) of a strike that already happened, set isStrike to false. - If it is providing real-time updates about an ongoing strike (e.g., "the metro is currently closed due to a strike"), set isStrike to false. - If it is providing real-time service updates (e.g., metro is open/closed during the strike), set isStrike to false. - ONLY set isStrike to true if it is an announcement of an upcoming strike. 2. If isStrike is true, extract the strike details: - Dates must be in 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' format. - Guaranteed times must be arrays of 'HH:mm-HH:mm' (omitted if not specified). - Location codes should be: 2-digit ISTAT for regions (e.g., "03" for Lombardia), or omitted for national strikes. Example Output if NOT a strike: { "isStrike": false } Example Output if IS a strike: { "isStrike": true, "strikeData": { "startDate": "2024-12-31 08:30:00", "endDate": "2024-12-31 12:30:00", "locationType": "REGIONAL", "locationCodes": ["12"], "guaranteedTimes": ["06:00-09:00", "18:00-21:00"] } } Input Content (Pre-processing: dom-distillation):

Context Metadata

  • Page Title: Domenica 16 novembre dalle ore 10 alle ore 18 sciopero dei treni regionali in LombardiaUser-logged-no-picCloseSend-mail-OKAlert
  • Date News: venerdì 14/11/2025
  • Header: Domenica 16 novembre dalle ore 10 alle ore 18 sciopero dei treni regionali in Lombardia

Domenica 16 novembre dalle ore 10 alle ore 18 sciopero dei treni regionali in Lombardia

venerdì 14/11/2025

Per l’agitazione indetta da ORSA previste ripercussioni sul servizio regionale, suburbano, aeroportuale

Dalle ore 9 alle ore 18 di domenica 16 novembre l’organizzazione sindacale ORSA ha indetto uno sciopero che potrà avere ripercussioni sulla circolazione dei treni regionali, suburbani, a lunga percorrenza e dei collegamenti aeroportuali e S50 Malpensa Aeroporto-Bellinzona. Le corse potranno subire variazioni e cancellazioni.

La mattina viaggeranno i treni con orario di partenza dalla stazione di origine corsa prima delle ore 10 e arrivo a destinazione entro le ore 11.

Saranno previsti autobus sostitutivi, senza fermate intermedie, per le corse del servizio aeroportuale non effettuate tra Milano Cadorna (da via Paleocapa, 1) e Malpensa Aeroporto e tra Stabio e Malpensa Aeroporto.

Le informazioni sulla circolazione saranno disponibili sul sito Trenord e tramite gli aggiornamenti in “real-time” sull’App.

Si invitano i passeggeri a prestare attenzione agli annunci sonori e ai monitor di stazione.

Comunicato stampa Sciopero 16 novembre 2025

PDF Document Found: /fileadmin/contenuti/TRENORD/3-News/Trenord_Informa/Comunicati_stampa/2025/Trenord_251114_CS_Sciopero_16_novembre_def.pdf

response.thoughts:
**My Analysis of the Strike Information**

Okay, let's break this down. My objective is clear: I need to extract strike information from this text, specifically targeting Trenord in the Lombardia region (code 03). The primary indicator is a strike announcement, triggering `isStrike: true`. If I identify a strike, then I need to extract detailed `strikeData`, conforming to the established schema. The output MUST be a single, valid JSON object, so no room for error.

I've got the title: "Domenica 16 novembre dalle ore 10 alle ore 18 sciopero dei treni regionali in Lombardia," which translates to "Sunday, November 16 from 10 am to 6 pm regional train strike in Lombardy." The content includes: "Dalle ore 9 alle ore 18 di domenica 16 novembre l’organizzazione sindacale ORSA ha indetto uno sciopero" ("From 9 am to 6 pm on Sunday, November 16, the ORSA trade union has called a strike"). The date of this news is Friday, November 14, 2025. That's good, confirms the strike is upcoming. The strike itself is on Sunday, November 16, 2025.

The time range is where it gets interesting. The title says "10 to 18", but the body text explicitly states "9 to 18". I'm going to prioritize the body text, so the strike start is at 09:00.

The location is Lombardia, code "03," which is the expected location based on the specification.

Guaranteed times are implied by the phrase: "La mattina viaggeranno i treni con orario di partenza dalla stazione di origine corsa prima delle ore 10 e arrivo a destinazione entro le ore 11." meaning trains will leave before 10 am, arriving before 11 am. Since the instructions say to omit the Guaranteed Times if they aren't explicitly specified, then I should omit this information.

Now I can set `isStrike` to `true`. I should construct the `strikeData`:

*   `startDate`: "2025-11-16 09:00:00"
*   `endDate`: "2025-11-16 18:00:00"
*   `locationType`: "REGIONAL"
*   `locationCodes`: ["03"]

I've ensured all required fields (`startDate`, `endDate`, `locationType`) are present. The `locationType` "REGIONAL" means I need the array `locationCodes`, and "03" is valid.

I'm confident this data is now formatted as requested, and ready for output as a JSON object.
